title: objects with nested maps
description: Object with a nested `Map<string, {sm: {s: string; arr: number[]}}>` property. The nested map serializes to a JSON array of `[key, value]` pairs and restores via `new Map(v)`; values are atomic-shaped so no value transform applies. Binary nests a size-prefixed entry list.
notes: The nested Map round-trips as a JSON array of [key, value] pairs, rehydrated to a Map on decode.
